items.title: Drones create the first-ever Fifa scoreboard in Seattle sky
items.description: BBC reporter Max Matza is in Seattle, Washington, where 400 drones lit up the night sky on Monday to display the score of the Egypt v Belgium match.
items.titleIt: Drones create the first-ever Fifa scoreboard in Seattle sky

items.title: “Strategic Balance” under Stress: Egypt and the U.S.-Israeli War with Iran
items.description: Egypt has been walking a tightrope since the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran began, joining mediation efforts while signalling solidarity with Gulf Arab partners under Iranian attack. But with some Gulf capitals voicing expectations of stronger support, Cairo may find itself under increasing pressure.
items.titleIt: “Strategic Balance” under Stress: Egypt and the U.S.-Israeli War with Iran

items.title: Sudan, South Sudan and Somalia: Key Peace and Security Priorities for Africa in 2026
items.description: In this online event, Crisis Group experts discussed peace and security priorities for the African continent in 2026, zooming in on Somalia, Sudan and South Sudan ahead of the African Union's summit of heads of state.
items.titleIt: Sudan, South Sudan and Somalia: Key Peace and Security Priorities for Africa in 2026

items.title: Africa: Our Ocean Conference Ends with Familiar Question - Will Pledges Be Met?
items.description: [allAfrica] Mombasa, Kenya -- A new round of pledges and partnerships marked the closing ceremony of the 11th Our Ocean Conference in Mombasa. Countries and stakeholders outlined commitments to scale up ocean action, finance and innovation. The question, however, remains whether these will amount to yet another list of promises.
items.titleIt: Africa: Our Ocean Conference Ends with Familiar Question - Will Pledges Be Met?

items.title: Tajani says Araghchi assured him of safe departure of Grimaldi ship
items.description: (ANSA) - ROME, JUN 17 - Foreign Minister Antonio Tajani said Wednesday his Iranian counterpart Abbas Araghchi had assured him of the safe departure of an Italian ship, the Grimaldi Group's car carrier Grande Torino, that has been blocked in the Persian Gulf for months. Araghchi, said Tajani on X, reporting on a phone call with his counterpart, "assured me that in the next few hours the Iranian authorities will ensure the conditions for the safe departure of the Italian Grimaldi ship 'Grande Torino,'" "blocked for months in the Gulf." (ANSA). Read article...
items.titleIt: Tajani says Araghchi assured him of safe departure of Grimaldi ship

items.title: Africa: Rwanda and South Africa - From Diplomatic Frost to Strategic Partnership and Greater People-to-People Mobility
items.description: [allAfrica] After more than a decade of diplomatic estrangement, Rwanda and South Africa appear to be taking meaningful steps toward rebuilding a relationship long marked by suspicion, political tensions, and missed opportunities. Recent high-level engagements between Kigali and Pretoria suggest a growing recognition that Africa's future is better served by cooperation than confrontation. As both countries seek to strengthen their positions within a rapidly evolving continental landscape, the restoration of
items.titleIt: Africa: Rwanda and South Africa - From Diplomatic Frost to Strategic Partnership and Greater People-to-People Mobility

items.title: Ethiopia: U.S. sanctions officials over Tigray tensions
items.description: A statement from the State Department said rising tensions between TPLF hardliners and the federal government threaten to restart conflict in the Tigray region
items.titleIt: Ethiopia: U.S. sanctions officials over Tigray tensions

items.title: Italy to reopen Tehran embassy on Friday says Tajani
items.description: (ANSA) - ROME, JUN 17 - Deputy Premier and Foreign Minister Antonio Tajani told a question time session in parliament on Wednesday that Italy will reopen its embassy in Tehran on Friday after Iran and the United States reached an agreement to end the war in the Middle East. Premier Giorgia Meloni's government has already said Italy is willing to take part in an international naval mission for the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. (ANSA). Read article...
items.titleIt: Italy to reopen Tehran embassy on Friday says Tajani

items.title: As war keeps spreading, the African Union must find its teeth
items.description: With the continental body at its weakest point since its inception, this week’s summit in Ethiopia cannot be another talk shop. A united front is crucial to resolve intensifying conflicts tearing through Africa.
items.titleIt: As war keeps spreading, the African Union must find its teeth
